notes: 3.10.08 (nen 3.10.07): File Excel 'So Thu/Chi ho tau QL' (opExportExcel) — tach cot gia tri: Gia tri goc | Phi NH (bankFee+otherFee) | Tien te | Quy doi USD (gia tri+phi). Them cot Bo phan + Ngay lap phieu (createdAt). Sap xep theo ten NV -> ngay giao dich (de doi chieu khi in). Giu tach 2 phan: I. Da phat sinh (chi thuc) + II. Du kien chi. Chi ho ao tu AP: phi = tong bankFee+otherFee cac dot TT. Chi sua ham xuat Excel + _opApVirtualTx (mang phi len de xuat), khong dung logic so du/nghiep vu.
